channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Enhance SMS APIs with delivery status and sorting options
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Adds a `delivery_status` response field to SMS session and message endpoints, and introduces a `sort `request field to SMS session APIs to control result ordering.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Seamlessly join meetings on Google Meet hardware with “Connect Room”
item.description:
Google Workspace

In December 2025, we introduced Connect room to organizations on the Rapid Release track enrolled in Early Preview Rooms. We’re excited to announce that this feature is now rolling out to all Workspace customers with Google Meet hardware. This feature allows users to start or join meetings from...

View release notes →

item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New fields in various existing APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New response fields in the multiple Quote and Order APIs. New request fields in multiple Quote, Order, and Account Management APIs.

View release notes →

Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added network monitoring.

item.title: Zoom - A dozen new endpoints, two new events, and several new fields in existing endpoints and events

Zoom

Tags: api-release | Twelve new endpoints and two new webhook events; new request and response fields.

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.4.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added network monitoring.

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - April 17, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Expanded NotebookLM capabilities for Education Plus and Teaching and Learning add-on customersWe’re increasing limits across NotebookLM features for customers with Google Workspace for Education Plus or a Teaching and Learning add-on license at no additional cost. Users will now see a Plus badge...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Streamlining admin controls for Gemini Enterprise in the Google Workspace Admin console
item.description:
Google Workspace

Managing generative AI tools that can access your Google Workspace data will be easier than before with dedicated controls to manage Gemini Enterprise access in the Workspace Admin console. These settings will live in a new subsection in the left side menu bar under “Generative AI.” As part of this...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improved video quality on high-resolution displays in Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re updating Meet to provide higher quality video for users with high-resolution displays on the web and in rooms. This change will provide sharper and more detailed video, particularly for meetings with three or more participants.Video before and after this change on a high resolution displayTo...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1863 (Canary Channel)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1863 to the Canary Channel. (KB 5083725) What’s new in Canary Build 28020.1863 Changes and Improvements g The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1863 (Canary Channel) appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29570.1000
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we’re releasing Windows Insider Preview Build 29570.1000 to the Windows 11 Insider Canary Channel on the optional 29500 build series. What’s new in Canary Build 29570.1000 Change The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29570.1000...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8313 and 26200.8313 to the Release Preview Channel
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we’re releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8313 and 26200.8313 (KB5083631) to Insiders in the Release Preview Channel on Windows 11, versions 24H2 (Build 26100) and 25H2 (Build 26200). This update is available The post Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8313 and 26200.8313...

View release notes →

Changes in Beta Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (i The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8271...

item.title: Kuali Build - UPDATE: Updates to How Table Gadget Data is Returned Via API (now scheduled for May 10, 2026)
item.description:
Kuali Build

Based on customer feedback, we’re postponing the update to how Table gadget data is formatted in API JSON responses to May 10, 2026 to allow...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Now in beta: Download client-side encrypted Google Slides
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are pleased to share that export capabilities are now available for client-side encrypted (CSE) Slides files. Beta users can "Download and decrypt" CSE Slides files and export their Slides as PowerPoint files, facilitating seamless interoperability between platforms. This launch includes...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Collapsible Sections
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now expand and collapse Sections in the Form Designer—making it much easier to work with large, complex forms. Why This MattersManag...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Now available: The Gemini app for Mac
item.description:
Google Workspace

Today, we’re bringing the Gemini app to macOS as a native desktop experience, designed to live right where you work. It’s always just a keyboard shortcut away, allowing you to quickly get the help you need without losing your focus.Here are a few ways you can use it right now:Stay in your flow:...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: By bringing a native app to Mac, we're cutting down on context switching and giving you a faster, more integrated way to use Gemini alongside the
item.description:
Gemini

Why: By bringing a native app to Mac, we're cutting down on context switching and giving you a faster, more integrated way to use Gemini alongside the tools you use every day.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re introducing the Gemini app for Mac, a native desktop experience built to help you get more done without disrupting your flow. With a simpl
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re introducing the Gemini app for Mac, a native desktop experience built to help you get more done without disrupting your flow. With a simple keyboard shortcut (Option + Space), you can bring up Gemini alongside any application you're using. You can also seamlessly share your window,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New more expressive AI voiceovers in Google Vids, and 16 additional languages, powered by Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS
item.description:
Google Workspace

With the release of our new Gemini 3.1 Flash Text-To-Speech (TTS) model, AI voiceovers in Google Vids now include 30 new conversational voice options that better capture natural expression and realism. All 30 AI voiceover options are now supported in 24 different languages.You can test these new...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - March 2026 Release Announcement
item.description:
Kuali Build

improvements Admin preview for streamlined UI updatesPerformance improvementsAccessibility Improvementsfeature Hierarchical group selectio...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini in Google Classroom is now available in all Classroom-supported languages
item.description:
Google Workspace

Last year, we launched Gemini in Google Classroom in English to support educators with planning and creating engaging lessons, and to help students in higher education to study and learn. Starting this week, we’re beginning to expand availability to all Classroom-supported languages in which Gemini...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.5 beta 2 (25F5053d)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Additional BYOD peripheral switchers certified for Google Meet in ChromeOS touch controller rooms
item.description:
Google Workspace

We have certified additional Lightware peripheral switchers, so that you and your team can bring your own devices (BYOD) to Google Meet on ChromeOS touch controller rooms. The new devices bring improvements for video processing, networking, connectivity and security.Plug your laptop into a Meet...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Prepare for the NEET UG with practice tests in Gemini
item.description:
Google Workspace

We recently launched full-length, no-cost practice tests in Gemini, starting with the SAT and JEE Main. Today, we’re expanding practice tests to support the NEET UG.We have grounded practice tests in rigorously vetted content from leading education companies like Physics Wallah and Careers360, to...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded NotebookLM capabilities for Education Plus and Teaching & Learning add-on customers
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re increasing limits across NotebookLM features for customers with Google Workspace for Education Plus or a Teaching and Learning add-on license at no additional cost. Users will now see a Plus badge next to their profile picture, indicating access to higher usage thresholds.Users with Google...

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new endpoints to Order API for response field old_subscription_pricelist_id and subscription_pricelist_id.

Zoom

item.title: Zoom - Zoom Claude Connector - Now available!
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: new-feature | We are excited to announce the general availability of Zoom for Claude Connector, which allows users to use natural language within Anthropic’s Claude AI to search Zoom meeting assets, access recording resources, and generate summaries or action items from Zoom transcripts and...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.4.0-1
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Added ISO Recording feature and enhanced subsession management. Supported manual share view attachment and detachment. Fixed self-video rotation dimensions and footer menu display issues.

View release notes →

ClickUp

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

We wanted to make you aware of forthcoming changes to how our Table gadget data is formatted in JSON when returned via the API. If you have ...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 25.0.10
item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - PKCE is now generally available!
item.description:
Slack

We are excited to announce support for Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE). PKCE is an OAuth security extension that enables developers to build more secure Slack applications on public clients, such as desktop apps and mobile apps, without the need to embed a vulnerable client_secret.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Assets APIs⁠(opens in a new tab or window) now return an additional metadata property as part of the asset object.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating e
item.description:
Canva

The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating export jobs for email designs, depending on whether you need bundled assets (html_bundle) or a standalone HTML output (html_standalone).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately f
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately from your data.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
item.description:
Canva

A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal
item.description:
Gemini

What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal context, preferences, and full chat history from other AI apps directly into Gemini. To bring over your memories, simply select the import option in...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: The most helpful AI assistant is one that understands your preferences and past conversations. Starting over with a new assistant can feel daunti
item.description:
Gemini

Why: The most helpful AI assistant is one that understands your preferences and past conversations. Starting over with a new assistant can feel daunting, so we created these tools to let you quickly get Gemini up to speed on what matters most to you without starting from scratch. By bringing over...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal
item.description:
Gemini

What: Starting today, we are rolling out new switching tools to your Settings page for all consumer accounts. You can now easily import your personal context, preferences, and full chat history from other AI apps directly into Gemini. To bring over your memories, simply select the import option in...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - interactive visual module
item.description:
ChatGPT

“Help me understand the Pythagorean theorem.”“Explain how PV = nRT works.”“How do I find the area of a circle?” Availability: Rolling out to all logged-in ChatGPT users across consumer and business plans.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to help you tackle even more complex problems.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve mod
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve modern challenges across science, research, and engineering. By blending deep scientific knowledge with everyday engineering utility, Deep Think now...

View release notes →
